summary: DC Search API testing completed. All 26 backend tests passed. POST /api/dc/search and GET /api/dc/site/:id endpoints working correctly. API generates sites from 101 HTB substations, enriches with S3REnR data, scores with strategy-based weighting. Calais (28MW) and Valenciennes (65MW) show correct S3REnR capacity. IDF sites correctly marked as saturated with warning comments. All strategies (speed/cost/power/balanced) produce different global scores. Pagination, region filtering, brownfield filter all working.
passed_tests: POST /api/dc/search without region returns all France results (101 sites)
POST /api/dc/search results have all required fields (site_id, name, location, land, grid, timeline, urbanism, score, tags, comment)
Score.global is between 0-100 for all sites
Results are sorted by score.global descending
POST /api/dc/search returns proper meta (total_results, page, per_page, total_pages, search_time_ms, strategy)
POST /api/dc/search with IDF region returns saturated sites with low power scores
IDF saturated sites have warning comments mentioning saturation
POST /api/dc/search with PACA region returns sites sorted by score
POST /api/dc/search with HdF region and grid_priority=true filters out saturated sites
Region aliases work (IDF, ile-de-france, paris, PACA, provence, HdF, HDF, hauts-de-france, nord)
POST /api/dc/search with strategy=speed returns correct strategy in meta
POST /api/dc/search with strategy=power returns correct strategy in meta
POST /api/dc/search with strategy=cost returns correct strategy in meta
POST /api/dc/search defaults to balanced strategy
Different strategies produce different global scores for same sites
Pagination works (page, per_page, total_pages calculated correctly)
Page 2 returns different results than page 1
POST /api/dc/search with brownfield_only=true filters correctly
Calais site shows correct S3REnR capacity (~28MW) and saturation=low
Valenciennes site shows correct S3REnR capacity (~65MW) and saturation=low
Tags field contains relevant labels (capacite_ok, haute_tension, reseau_disponible, etc.)
Comment field provides useful AI-interpretable text with MW and delay info
GET /api/dc/site/:id returns full site detail with connectivity and reinforcement info
GET /api/dc/site/invalid_id returns 404
Empty region filter returns all France results
High MW target affects power scoring (lower scores for 100MW vs 10MW target)
test_credentials: No auth required for DC search API endpoints
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - API uses in-memory data from france_infra_data.py (101 HTB substations) and s3renr_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: DC Search API fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/dc/search (accepts mw_target, region, strategy, grid_priority, brownfield_only, page, per_page) and GET /api/dc/site/:id. S3REnR direct matches: Calais (28MW), Valenciennes (65MW). IDF region is saturated. Strategies: speed, cost, power, balanced. All 26 tests pass.
